title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.363 - Richard L. Harriman Highway designated in Clay County
text:
227.363.  Richard L. Harriman Highway designated in Clay County. — The portion of State Route H in Clay County from the intersection of State Route H and Richfield Road north to the intersection of State Route H and State Route B shall be designated the "Richard L.  Harriman Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2005 H.B. 487)
